technologies.name: Artificial Intelligence
technologies.description: Artificial Intelligence enables machines to simulate human intelligence and decision making.

technologies.name: Machine Learning
technologies.description: Machine Learning allows systems to learn patterns from data without explicit programming.

technologies.name: Blockchain
technologies.description: Blockchain is a decentralized ledger technology that securely records transactions.

technologies.name: Cloud Computing
technologies.description: Cloud Computing delivers computing services like storage, servers, databases, and software over the internet.
technologies.applications: Web Hosting, Scalable Applications, Data Storage

technologies.name: Cybersecurity
technologies.description: Cybersecurity protects systems, networks, and data from unauthorized access and digital attacks.
technologies.applications: Network Security, Threat Detection, Data Protection

technologies.name: Data Science
technologies.description: Data Science combines statistics, programming, and business knowledge to extract insights from data.

technologies.name: Internet of Things
technologies.description: IoT connects physical devices to the internet for monitoring and automation.
technologies.applications: Smart Homes, Smart Cities, Industrial Automation

technologies.name: DevOps
technologies.description: DevOps combines development and operations to improve software delivery speed and reliability.

technologies.name: React
technologies.description: React is a JavaScript library used to build fast and interactive user interfaces with reusable components.
technologies.applications: Single Page Applications, Dashboards, Web Platforms

technologies.name: Generative AI
technologies.description: Generative AI creates new content such as text, images, code, and audio using advanced machine learning models.
technologies.applications: Content Creation, Coding Assistants, Design Tools

technologies.name: Big Data
technologies.description: Big Data focuses on processing and analyzing large datasets to discover patterns and support business decisions.
technologies.applications: Data Pipelines, Customer Analytics, Real-Time Processing

technologies.name: Robotics
technologies.description: Robotics combines hardware, software, sensors, and control systems to build machines that perform tasks automatically.
